name: run_paga_trajectory
description: Run PAGA (Partition-based Graph Abstraction; Wolf et al., Genome Biology 2019) on a single-cell AnnData to estimate connectivity between cell clusters and sketch the trajectory backbone. Builds a neighbors graph if one is absent (log-normalize -> PCA -> neighbors), runs scanpy.tl.paga, then returns the cluster x cluster connectivity matrix plus the strongest connected cluster pairs (edges above a threshold). Input is a server-accessible .h5ad whose obs contains the requested cluster_key.

adata_path.description: Server-accessible path or URL to an .h5ad AnnData whose obs contains `cluster_key`.

cluster_key.description: obs column holding the discrete cluster labels (e.g. 'leiden' or 'cell_type').

threshold.description: Minimum connectivity for an edge to be reported (default 0.1).

clusters.description: Cluster names (categories of cluster_key), in matrix order.

connectivity_matrix.description: Dense cluster x cluster PAGA connectivity matrix.

edges.description: Cluster pairs with connectivity >= threshold ({from, to, connectivity}), sorted strongest-first — the trajectory backbone.

error.description: Error description if the run failed.
